query: SELECT DATE(`createdAt`) AS day, count(distinct `sessionKey`) FROM `page_views` WHERE (`page_views`.`createdAt` >= '2026-03-13 00:00:00.000' AND (`page_views`.`timeOnPage` IS NULL OR `page_views`.`timeOnPage` >= 8)) GROUP BY day;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user QXWpcJKwPBoGqNG.f679bd03aa5d --database CAeRhAUjAZoEuxNGm5QbPr --execute SELECT DATE(`createdAt`) AS day, count(distinct `sessionKey`) FROM `page_views` WHERE (`page_views`.`createdAt` >= '2026-03-13 00:00:00.000' AND (`page_views`.`timeOnPage` IS NULL OR `page_views`.`timeOnPage` >= 8)) GROUP BY day;
